easy.title: Loan Eligibility
easy.description: Write `can_get_loan(age, income, credit_score)` using nested checks: age >= 21 -> income >= 30000 -> credit_score >= 650.

medium.title: Refactor to Guard Clauses
medium.description: Rewrite the loan eligibility function above using flat guard clauses with early returns.
medium.solution:
def can_get_loan_flat(age, income, credit_score):
    if age < 21: return False
    if income < 30000: return False
    if credit_score < 650: return False
    return True
hints: Check failing condition and return False immediately

hard.title: Nested Permission Matrix
hard.description: Evaluate user roles ('admin', 'editor', 'viewer') and document status ('draft', 'published', 'archived') to check edit access.
hints: Admin can edit anything; Editor can edit draft & published

debugging.title: Fix Dangling Else Bug
debugging.description: Fix the indentation of else block to match inner condition.
bugs: Else block was aligned with age check instead of ticket check.
